description:
This was a game I played on KGS as black. And a second before I hit the resign button, the winning sequence came to my mind.
This is my first problem I post here. If you find any forgotten variations, please let me know.

Thanks to Spica and Hans for the corrections. Hope everything is fine now and I didn't miscount.
